topic: Market expansion and business model analysis for a niche software category
reader: founder deciding whether the segment is large enough to pursue
use_context: A business analysis that separates market size, growth signals, customer pain, and strategic risk.
required_claims: strategic implications for entry or expansion
prohibited_overclaims: does not claim an exact market size without basis
does not call a trend inevitable
does not present a single source as complete

source_packets.title: Industry benchmark report
source_packets.summary: Provides segment growth, buyer pain points, and concentration signals across the category.

findings.statement: Buyer demand clusters around a small number of high-pain workflows.
findings.decision_note: Use this to explain where the opportunity is concentrated.
failure_modes: overgeneralizing a niche with heterogeneous buyers
misunderstandings: assuming all buyers value the same workflow

findings.statement: Channel concentration is a meaningful go-to-market risk.
findings.decision_note: Flag concentration risk if recommending expansion.
failure_modes: treating growth as independent of channel dependency
misunderstandings: assuming a strong top-line trend implies resilient distribution

source_packets.title: Competitor earnings commentary
source_packets.summary: Adds market color on competitive dynamics, pricing pressure, and buyer sensitivity.

findings.statement: Pricing pressure is visible where buyers can compare offerings directly.
findings.decision_note: This should temper any optimistic pricing narrative.
failure_modes: assuming the segment has durable pricing power everywhere
misunderstandings: reading one competitor's guidance as universal market evidence

findings.statement: Differentiation depends more on workflow depth than on broad feature count.
findings.decision_note: This is useful for the strategic recommendation, if the source set supports it.
failure_modes: treating broad feature breadth as the main competitive moat
misunderstandings: assuming the market rewards breadth over depth
